title: isotrema obliquum
intro: Isotrema obliquum, also known as the Himalayan mayapple, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Isotrema obliquum lie in its roots and leaves, which contain a compound called annonin, which has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and protect against certain types of cancer, among others. Herbal preparations of Isotrema obliquum can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
